sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111563" key="filofai/ac" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-φαίαξ</orth>, <itype lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="itype">ᾱκος</itype>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>, <sense id="n111563.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">friend of the Phaeacians,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Choerob.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">in Thd.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">1.287</biblScope> </bibl> H.</sense> </entryFree>
